title: Slovakian Buckwheat Pancakes
description: Traditional Slovakian buckwheat pancakes, a hearty breakfast treat with a delicate flavor.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine buckwheat flour, pancakes flour, and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together Slovakian water, eggs, and bitter ghee.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
4. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
5. Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
6. Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
7. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
8. Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite toppings.
